programme.title: Two Worlds Apart Ep06
programme.desc: Explore the slums that crept up unplanned within major cities and the life thriving in it. programme.title: Live: Tour de France Men
programme.desc: Coverage from the 14th stage of the Grand Tour race, a 155.3km mountain route from Mulhouse to Le Markstein Fellering. Dutch cyclist Thymen Arensman claimed this stage last year as he became the second rider from the Netherlands to win a stage at the 2025 race. He finished just clear of eventual winner Tadej Pogacar to claim his sole victory at last year's race.

programme.title: Live MLB
programme.desc: Chicago Cubs v Minnesota Twins (Start-time 7.20pm). Coverage of the inter-league match from Wrigley Field. These two teams last faced each other in July last year when they played a three-game series in Minneapolis. The Twins won the first two matches thanks to 8-1 and 4-2 victories before the Cubs claimed an 8-1 consolation win.

programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: West Indies v New Zealand. Coverage of the fourth ODI in the five-match series from Kensington Oval in Barbados. The visitors are searching for their fourth consecutive ODI series victory against the West Indies, having won the previous three by scores of 3-0, 2-1 and 3-0. The hosts haven't beaten the Kiwis in a series in this format since 2012 when they won a five-match contest 4-1.

programme.title: Borneo's Unique Building Ep03

programme.title: Headgear Hunting Ep03

programme.title: Bridging Borneo Ep01

programme.title: Negeri Yang Hilang Di Sarawak Ep06

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 53
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 20
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.title: THEATER DRAMA : MR UNTUNG & MISS SIAL
programme.desc: A program drama FTV about love, friendship, family, happy, sad etc, played by popular actor and actress Indonesia.

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 46-47
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 21
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: TERIKAT JANJI EPS 21
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Davina, a conglomerate's daughter who falls into poverty after being betrayed. She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts.
